plugins.name: strategic-thinker
plugins.description: Apply structured strategic reasoning before implementation. Enforces a 5-pillar analysis framework (pattern recognition, root-cause questioning, resource analysis, hands-on validation, clear communication) on architectural decisions, system design, and complex problem-solving. Includes experimental extensions: De Bono Six Thinking Hats, Islamic epistemology cognitive levels, and Bridges synthesis connecting classical wisdom with modern engineering.
